title: Reject hand-edited generated adapter artifacts
summary: Generated adapter outputs must match canonical sources after regeneration.

enforcement.message: Generated adapters drifted. Regenerate from canonical sources instead of hand-editing generated files.

hard_gate_evidence.project_local_enablement: Enabled by this project's policy after repeated adapter drift fixes.
hard_gate_evidence.soft_soak_period: Ran as a warning-only check before HARD adoption.
hard_gate_evidence.independent_recurrence_or_audited_mainta: Confirmed by maintainer audit of generated adapter drift incidents.
hard_gate_evidence.deterministic_check: Regeneration followed by git diff is deterministic for tracked generated adapter outputs.
hard_gate_evidence.low_false_positive_rate: Only fires when regenerated output differs from committed generated artifacts.
hard_gate_evidence.rollback_available: Disable this project-local rule or regenerate adapters and revert generated drift.
hard_gate_evidence.eval_record: Project eval record links the original drift finding and passing regeneration check.
hard_gate_evidence.audit_trail: Decision log records promotion from soft to adopted_hard.
